name: Sort Gryte (Norwegian Black Pot)
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Can cream of mushroom soup
2 Leeks, cooked and cut into half pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine soup, milk, salt, and pepper; blend well.
2. Heat the mixture until it begins to simmer gently.
3. Stir in chicken, ham, peas, leeks, and tomatoes.
4. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about 10 minutes or until heated through.
5. Stir in Madeira wine.
6 servings
